glossary.finish first, win, second place, or thir: 跑进前一（独赢）、前二（位置）或前三（展示）
glossary.bet on it to finish first (win), second: 押它跑进前一（独赢）、前二（位置）或前三（展示）
glossary.oldest pastimes: Oldest Pastimes（保留英文，这是品牌名）
glossary.Wheel of Fortune: Wheel of Fortune（保留英文，品牌名）
glossary.Wheel of Fortune Triple Spin: Wheel of Fortune Triple Spin（保留英文，品牌名）
glossary.research the venue: 了解一下这个场所的情况
glossary.four to a flush: 四张同花听牌（差一张成同花）

rules: Card rank names: ALWAYS use A, K, Q, J, 10, 9... 2 (NEVER 国王, 皇后, 杰克). Example: 'pair of kings' → 一对K, 'queen high' → Q或以上, 'queen high or better' → Q高或更好的牌.

In four-of-a-kind contexts: 'four sixes' → 拿到6的四条, 'four sevens through tens' → 拿到7到10的四条, 'four of a kind six or lower' → 拿到6或以下的四条. Use 拿到 not 有...个. Use numerals (6, 7, 10) not Chinese number words (六个, 七个). Example: NOT '如果你有六个或更低的四条', CORRECT: '如果你拿到6或以下的四条，就保留在一起'.
In Pai Gow: 'set your hand' / 'set hand' = 摆牌 or 分牌 (arranging cards), NOT 设置手牌. 'split' = 拆分.

In Pai Gow: 'play [X] in your high/low hand' ALWAYS means 把[X]放在高/低牌那手. This applies to ANY X including multiple items: 'play straights and flushes in your high hand' = 把顺子和同花放在高牌那手, 'play the pair in your high hand' = 把一对放在高牌那手, 'play three of a kind in your high hand' = 把三条放在高牌那手. NEVER use 打 or 玩 for this pattern — 打顺子 is WRONG, 在高牌那手玩三条 is WRONG.
In Pai Gow: 'Joker' = 鬼牌 (NOT 小丑牌 which means clown). The Joker in Pai Gow acts as a wild card for completing straights, flushes, and as an Ace.

In Pai Gow pair classification: '2 through 6 is a low pair' = 2到6算低对, '7 through 10 is a medium pair' = 7到10算中对, 'J through A is a high pair' = J到A算高对. Use 算 (counts as), NOT 是对 which is grammatically malformed. 'two high pairs' = 两对高对 (NOT 两个高对 or 如果你有两个高对).
Use 游戏 for 'games' in casino contexts (NOT 节目 which means TV programs).
Use 买入 for 'buy-in' (NOT 入场费 which means admission fee).
'table games' = 桌上游戏 (NOT 桌面游戏 which sounds like desktop/tabletop games).
'Trips旁注' — use 旁注 for side bets like Trips, Pair Plus, Bonus. Never translate Trips as 三张同点数赌注 or 三同号.
'Ultimate Texas Hold'em' = 终极德州扑克 (NOT 极限, 至尊, or other variants).
Poker actions must be translated precisely — never confuse check (过牌) with call (跟注).

NEVER translate channel names, brand names, product names, or game titles. Keep them in English unless there is an established official Chinese name. Example: 'Win TV' stays as WinTV (one word, no space), NOT 独赢电视. Always write WinTV as one word consistently throughout.
'three card poker' = 三张牌扑克 (NOT 三人扑克, which means poker played by three people).

THREE-CARD POKER hand rankings (from low to high): 高牌、一对、同花、顺子、三条、同花顺. Three-card poker has NO 四条 (four of a kind), NO 葫芦 (full house), NO 两对 (two pair). If a caption continuation says 'of a kind' after a previous caption ended with 'three', it means 三条 (three of a kind), NOT 四条.
'slot machine' / 'slots' = 老虎机 (NOT 槽位). 'video slots' = 视频老虎机.
'here is some place to...' or 'some places to...' when meaning 'ways/tips' = 方法/做法 (NOT 位置 which means physical location).
'play the numbers' in gambling context = 按概率来玩 / 按数学概率来玩 (NOT 押注数字 which means bet on numbers).
'big leak' in gambling strategy = 长期来看会很亏 / 长期会失血 (NOT 大漏洞 which is too literal).
'play bet' in UTH/Three Card Poker = Play注. Keep 'Play' in English as it's a specific bet name. Don't translate as 玩注.

In Three Card Poker: 'play or fold' / 'decide to play' = 下Play注或弃牌 (NOT 跟注或弃牌). 'Play' here refers to making the Play bet, not a general action. 跟注 (call) is a different poker action that does NOT exist in Three Card Poker.

'bonus' as a side bet name in poker (e.g., 'bet the bonus', 'the bonus bet') = Bonus旁注 or 押Bonus注. 'ante bonus' = 底注奖金. Keep 'Bonus' in English when it's a bet name. Do NOT translate as 赌bonus or 赌注奖金.
'hole cards' in poker = 底牌 (NOT 整牌). ASR may mishear 'hole' as 'whole' — both should be translated as 底牌.
In slots: 'win' / 'chance to win' = 中奖机会 (NOT 独赢机会 — 独赢 is a horse racing term). 'payouts' = 赔付 (NOT 赔率 which means odds).
In bingo: 'you got bingo' / 'you hit bingo' = Bingo！/ 你中了Bingo！. 'caller' = 报号员. 'dauber' / 'ink dauber' = 宾果点号笔.
In bingo contexts: use 宾果厅 or 场馆 for bingo venue (NOT 赌场 which means casino). Bingo halls are distinct from casinos.
For casino promos: '人人都有机会赢' for 'everyone can win' (NOT 每个人都能独赢).
'a great selection of games' / 'collection of games' = 丰富的游戏选择 (NOT 丰富的游戏收藏 which sounds like collecting games).
'a great atmosphere' / 'great atmosphere to play' = 绝佳的游戏氛围 (NOT 一个非常适合玩游戏的氛围 or 一个很好的氛围来玩游戏 — both are translation-y).
'Who you got?' in sports betting context is an idiom meaning 'Who are you betting on?' = 你押谁？ or 你看好谁？ (NEVER 你是谁？ which means 'Who are you?').
Natural phrasing: 'this strategy has been simplified so you can learn it' = 这个策略经过简化，方便你学习、记住 (NOT 这种策略简化了让你能够 or 这种策略被简化了以便你可以).
'fewer cards to mark makes it easier to keep up' = 卡片少一点，会更容易跟上游戏节奏 (NOT 减少需要标记的卡片数量会让游戏更容易跟进).
In Pai Gow with Joker/five aces: 'always split them unless you also have a pair of kings' = 务必拆开，除非你还有一对K. Use a SINGLE condition (除非), NOT double-negation or double-unless (否则...否则...).
'over half a dozen' / 'more than half a dozen' = 六个以上 (NOT 十几个 which means 'a dozen or so', and NOT 六七个 which is too casual for broadcast). 'half a dozen' = 六个, 'a dozen' = 一打/十二个.
'our people' / 'our staff' in casino promo context = 我们的员工 or 我们的工作人员 (NOT 我们的人 which sounds unnatural in Chinese).
In bingo: 'free play' / 'free game' = 免费游戏 (NOT 免费的一次 which is incomplete). 'program' when referring to a bingo event = 活动安排 or 场次 (NOT 程序 which means software/procedure).
In slots: 'reel' = 转轴 (NOT 轮盘 which is roulette). 'symbol' on a slot reel = 符号 or 图案 (NOT 分隔符号 which means delimiter/separator). 'wheel' in bonus wheel = 奖金转盘 (NOT 轮盘切片).

For promo/marketing text: use natural Chinese phrasing, not word-for-word translation. Example: 'plan your next lucky trip' = 开启你的下一次幸运之旅 (NOT 计划你的下一次幸运之旅). 'the best place to play' = 最佳游戏去处 (NOT 最好的地方来玩).
'fold your hand' / 'give up your hand' = 弃牌 (NOT 放弃你的手牌 which is too literal). In poker, 'hand' refers to the cards you hold — never translate as 手牌 in isolation.
'flush draw' = 同花听牌, 'straight draw' = 顺子听牌. Use 听牌 (drawing/waiting for a card), NOT 一张同花听牌 (which adds a wrong counter 一张). Say 有同花听牌 or 拿到同花听牌.
'community cards' / 'board cards' in Hold'em = 公共牌. 'first three community cards' = 前三张公共牌 (the flop). 'flop' = 翻牌 or 前三张公共牌.
'unless you also have two pair' in Pai Gow = 除非你还有两对. Never combine into garbled forms like 一对两对 or 除非你有一对两对.
In bingo: 'run a game' / 'running a game' = 开一局游戏 or 进行一场游戏 (NOT 运行游戏 which sounds like running software).
'for more play' / 'more action' in promo context = 更多精彩玩法 or 更多游戏乐趣 (NOT 为了更多玩法 which is stilted).

Pair counting with classifiers: 'two medium pairs' = 两对中对 (NOT 一对中对). 'two high pairs' = 两对高对. 'two low pairs' = 两对低对. The number before 对 counts HOW MANY pairs. 一对 = one pair, 两对 = two pairs. NEVER say 一对中对 when the English says 'two medium pairs'. BUT for MIXED pairs: 'a medium pair and a low pair' = 一对中对和一对低对 (NOT 两对中对加一对低对 — that says 2 medium + 1 low = 3 pairs). 'a high pair and a low pair' = 一对高对和一对低对.
In Pai Gow: 'rules for setting your hand' / 'hand-setting rules' = 摆牌规则 (NOT 设置手牌的规则). 'A high in the low hand' = A放在低牌那手 (NOT A高放在低牌那手).

In UTH: when segment split breaks 'after the dealer turns over / the first three community cards', the translation MUST preserve the timing: 在庄家翻开前三张公共牌后. Do NOT split the condition from its trigger — merge into one clause if needed: '在庄家翻开前三张公共牌后，你可以下相当于底注两倍的Play注'.
In poker: 'waiting for the fourth or better flush' / 'four to a flush' = 有四张同花(差一张成同花) or 同花差一张. Do NOT translate literally as 等待第四好的同花 which is nonsensical.
'help a good cause' / 'support a good cause' = 支持公益事业 (NOT 帮助一个好事业 which is literal and unnatural).

'you can count on WinTV as your comprehensive guide' / 'rely on Win TV' = WinTV带你全面了解 or 跟着WinTV了解 (NEVER 你可以依赖WinTV作为你全方位的指南 — 依赖 sounds like addiction, and the whole sentence is word-for-word English structure).
'plan your next lucky trip' / 'ready to plan' / 'get ready to plan' = 开启你的下一次幸运之旅 or 准备开启你的幸运之旅 (NEVER 准备好计划你的下一次幸运之旅 or 准备好计划你下一趟幸运之旅 — 计划 is too literal).
'thanks for watching' / 'thank you for watching' = 感谢收看 (NOT 谢谢观看 which is understandable but less broadcast-standard).

In slots: 'full reel symbol' / 'full reel' = 整轴符号 (NOT 完整的转轴符号). 'split symbol' = 分裂符号 (NOT 分割符号 which means divider/cut). 'double symbol' = 双倍符号 (NOT 双赢符号). 'wheel slice' / 'slice of the wheel' = 转盘格 (NOT 转盘切片). 'reel' is always 转轴, 'wheel' in bonus context is always 转盘 — do NOT mix them up. Use 转轴 consistently for slot reels, 转盘 only for bonus wheels.
In slots bonus mechanics: 'awards extra credits through this payout' = 通过这个赔付额外奖励积分 (NOT 通过这种赔付...给予额外积分 which is stilted). Use 奖励 not 给予 for prize-giving.

Avoid translationese in strategy/promo text: 'tips on strategy' = 策略小贴士 or 实用策略 (NOT 玩法策略的建议). 'it becomes very easy to play correctly' = 正确玩法就变得很简单 (NOT 正确地玩游戏就变得非常容易). 'win more money' = 赢更多 or 提高赢面 (NOT 赢得更多钱 which is too literal). 'lots of great games' = 丰富多样的游戏 (NOT 有很多精彩玩法).

CRITICAL horse racing rule: 'place' = 前二 (top 2, NOT 第二/second), 'show' = 前三 (top 3, NOT 第三/third). 'Win/Place/Show' = 独赢/前二/前三. When translating 'bet on it to finish first (win), second (place), or third (show)': CORRECT = 押它跑进前一（独赢）、前二（位置）或前三（展示）. WRONG = 押它跑第一、第二或第三. The words 第二 and 第三 are FORBIDDEN in Place/Show contexts because place means finishing in top 2 (not exactly 2nd) and show means finishing in top 3 (not exactly 3rd).
'pari-mutuel' in horse racing = 彩池投注 (NOT 联合投注 which sounds like joint betting). Pari-mutuel means all bets are pooled.

In slots: 'overhead screen' / 'top screen' = 顶部屏幕 (NOT 头顶屏幕 which sounds like it's on your head). 'Triple your fun' = 三倍乐趣 or 乐趣翻三倍 (NOT 三倍你的乐趣 which is literal English word order). 'Triple Spin Bonus' = Triple Spin奖金回合 (keep Triple Spin in English, translate Bonus as 奖金回合). 'the ultimate thrill' = 极致刺激 (NOT 极致乐趣 which is too tame). 'center stage' = 中心舞台 (this is fine). 'sound chairs' = 音响座椅. 'multi-way' = 多路赔付 (NOT 多屏玩法 which means multi-screen). 'Wheel of Fortune excitement at its best' = Wheel of Fortune的极致体验 (NEVER translate Wheel of Fortune — it is a brand name. NEVER say 轮盘大富翁, 命运之轮, or 幸运之轮).

CRITICAL: 'Wheel of Fortune' is a registered brand name — ALWAYS keep in English. NEVER translate as 轮盘大富翁, 命运之轮, 幸运之轮, or any Chinese equivalent. Say 'Wheel of Fortune Triple Spin' not '轮盘大富翁Triple Spin'.

In slots: 'emotional credit' is an ASR error for 'additional credit' or 'a motional credit'. Translate as 额外积分 (NOT 情感积分 or 情绪积分 which are literal nonsense). The correct meaning is extra/bonus credits awarded through a payout mechanism.
'pelican' = 鹈鹕 (NOT 海鸥 which is seagull). These are different birds.
'buy-ins for any budget' / 'buy-in amounts' = 买入金额适合各种预算 (NOT 投入资金适合各种预算 — 投入资金 sounds like investment capital).
'Who you got?' / 'Who do you got?' in sports betting = 你看好谁？ or 你押谁？ followed by 我们这边 (NOT 我们的人 which sounds unnatural). Example: 'Who you got? Our people.' → '你看好谁？我们这边。'
In bingo: 'program' as a printed guide = 场次说明单 or 玩法说明单 (NOT 节目单 which means TV show listing, and NOT 活动安排 which is too generic).
In UTH/poker: 'any pair as long as it includes one of your hole cards' = 只要包含至少一张你的底牌，任何一对都应该加注. Do NOT say 任何一对都算 or 任何一对都可以 — the English says you should RAISE, not that it 'counts'.

In UTH/poker: 'four to a flush, fourth-best or better' means you have four cards of the same suit AND the flush you're drawing to would be the fourth-strongest or better. Translation: 如果你有四张同花听牌，且所听的是第四大或更好的同花，也应该加注. Do NOT say 追第四好的同花.
In Pai Gow: 'the next two highest as your two-card hand' = 把第二和第三高牌放在两张牌那手. Use 两张牌那手 (the two-card hand), NOT 低牌那手 unless the English specifically says 'low hand'.
In bingo: 'find a local game' = 找一场本地宾果活动 (NOT 找一个本地的游戏 which is too generic).
Tone: 'research the venue' = 了解一下这个场所的情况 (NOT 研究一下这个场所 — 研究 sounds academic/scientific in Chinese).
In slots: 'test the waters' / 'give it a try' = 试试手气 (NOT 试试水 which is too colloquial for broadcast).
'our guys' / 'our people' in casual sports betting dialog = 我们这边 (NOT 我们兄弟 or 我们，兄弟 which sounds like gangster slang).
In horse racing context: 'off-track wagering facility' / 'off-track betting' = 场外投注设施 (NOT 离场投注设施 — 离场 means leaving a venue). 'OTB' = 场外投注.
Subtitle fragment repair: if a segment is just '你可以赢。' or similar bare fragment, expand to include context: '你可以赢得的奖金。' or merge meaning with adjacent segment.
'get a sneak peek at your favorite games' / 'preview your favorite games' / 'a sneak peek into your favorite games' = 提前看看你喜欢的一些游戏 or 先了解你感兴趣的游戏 (NOT 让你先了解一些你最喜欢的游戏 — 一些你最喜欢 is clunky word order).
'win more money' / 'make more money' in gambling strategy = 赢更多 or 提高赢面 (NOT 赢得更多钱 — too literal for Chinese subtitles).

'here are some ways to make your sports betting safer' / 'here is some place to make your sports betting safer' = 几个让体育博彩更安全的方法 (NOT 这里有一些让体育博彩更安全的方法 — 这里有 is English 'here are' structure. Also NOT missing the main verb — output a complete sentence).
'for more responsible gaming' = 更多负责任博彩的方式 (NOT 为了更多负责任的游戏方式 — too literal and wordy).
'let someone else drive' / 'have someone else drive while you relax' = 让别人开车，你在车上放松 (NOT 让别人开车，自己在旅途中放松一下 — 在旅途中 is unnecessarily formal).
'racing excitement is still going strong' / 'is alive and well' = 赛马热潮依然不减 or 赛马依然火热 (NOT 赛马激情依然活跃 — sounds like a press release).
'everyone can win' / 'everyone has a chance' in promo = 人人都有赢的机会 (NOT 这里人人都有机会赢 — 这里 is unnecessary and the phrasing is stiff).

In Three Card Poker: 'the dealer needs queen high or better to qualify' = 庄家至少要有Q高才能达标. Use 达标 for 'qualify'. Phrasing: 至少Q高 (NOT Q高或更好的牌型 which sounds overly formal). 'If the dealer does not qualify' = 如果庄家未达标.
In Three Card Poker/UTH: 'call' = 跟注 (making a Play bet equal to ante). 'fold your hand and forfeit your ante' = 弃牌并放弃底注. NEVER say 放弃赌注 — be specific: 放弃底注.
NEVER output Chinese with quotation marks and alternatives like '活动丰富" 或 "精彩活动不断'. Always output ONE definitive translation, never two options separated by 或.

In Pai Gow: 'always split quads' / 'split four of a kind' = 总是把四条拆成两对. 'if you have four jacks or above' = 如果你拿到J以上的四条，总是拆成两对. For four-of-a-kind phrasing: say 拿到J以上的四条 (NOT 如果你有四个J或更高的四条 — 四个J is wrong, 四条 already implies four cards of one rank).

Cross-segment completion: if a segment ends mid-sentence (e.g., 'because you're placing six bets' is the full meaning but the segment cuts off), complete the thought within that segment. Do NOT leave a trailing fragment like '因为你下了六注' with no conclusion.

TERMINOLOGY CONSISTENCY — use these exact forms throughout, never mix variants: WinTV (one word, never 'Win TV' with space). Side bets: Trips旁注, Play注, Pair Plus旁注, Bonus旁注 (always use 旁注 for side bets, 注 for play/ante). Exacta直选/Exacta复式, Trifecta直选/Trifecta复式, Superfecta直选/Superfecta复式 (keep English bet names, translate straight/box as 直选/复式). 'scatter pays' = Scatter赔付 (NOT 分散赔付). 'dauber' = 宾果点号笔 (NOT 点印笔 or dabber).
'local' / 'locally' in promo context = 本地 or 就在本地 (NOT 很本地化 which sounds like localization jargon). Example: 'it's fun, it's local' = 好玩又就在本地.
'experience spintastic thrills' / 'spintastic' = 体验旋转狂潮 (NOT 三重乐趣 which loses the spin/excitement feel). The word 'spintastic' combines 'spin' + 'fantastic' — convey spinning excitement.

asr_errors.emotional credit: 额外积分 (ASR error for 'additional credit' in slot contexts)
asr_errors.Who you got: Who do you have? (你押谁？ — sports betting idiom for 'who are you betting on?')
